title: parameterized type ignores parameter
body:
I modified `t/t_class_param.v` to showcase this issue.

The first issue is, that the parameter for a parameterized type is ignored, this part of the code properly fails.
I wrapped some code with `/* verilator lint_off WIDTH */` to avoid a build time error,
otherwise the example should pass without it.

There is also the commented out code, where class specialization is done separately from the the type usage, this ends in a parsing error.

I am using similar code with Vivado 2022.2 simulator, where it works properly.
